---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a safe, incremental enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What user/research problem should this solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the preferred direction at a high level.

## Alternatives considered
What other options were considered?

## Scope and safety constraints
- [ ] No raw webcam video storage
- [ ] No medical/clinical accuracy claims
- [ ] No risky production automation changes

## Affected areas
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] API contracts
- [ ] Data model
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Sample data

## Success criteria
How will we know this is complete?
